name: Mediafly Sales Content Intelligence API
what_it_does: Sales content intelligence and enablement platform with REST API — providing a centralized content library for sales teams, real-time content engagement analytics when prospects view shared materials, interactive presentation tools, value assessment calculators, and revenue intelligence from content signal data integrated with CRM.
use_cases: Querying content engagement analytics (views, time-spent, page-level) for deal intelligence
Managing sales content library programmatically for regional consistency
Integrating Mediafly content signal data with Salesforce for opportunity health scoring
Automating content package delivery to prospects based on deal stage triggers
Pulling interactive value calculator responses for sales and marketing insights
not_for: Sales training and readiness (use Mindtickle or Brainshark for training)
Cold email outreach and sequences (use Outreach or Salesloft)
General document management without sales-specific workflow
best_when: An enterprise sales team wants intelligent content delivery with deep engagement analytics showing exactly how prospects interact with sales materials, plus interactive tools (ROI calculators, product configurators) for complex B2B sales.
avoid_when: You need basic document sharing, sales training LMS, or outbound engagement sequences rather than content performance intelligence.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow. Bearer token with scoped access. Webhook for content view events and engagement milestones. Salesforce and HubSpot native integrations via separate OAuth. API token for server-to-server integrations. Org-scoped access with role-based permissions.

pricing.notes: Chicago-based company. Founded 2008. Raised $25M+. Acquired Inovavideo (2017), Story Dimensions (2018), Presentify (2019), Alinean (2020). Interactive content differentiator — value assessment calculators and interactive demos built-in. Revenue360 buyer engagement hub. Content analytics at page/slide level. Strong in manufacturing, healthcare, and financial services enterprises.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for content library, sharing, analytics, and engagement data. OAuth2 auth. Limited public documentation. Interactive content (value calculators) require Mediafly editor to create — API manages and reports. Content engagement analytics at page level is unique capability. Webhook for view events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Content reads fully idempotent. Engagement analytics reads idempotent by date range. Share reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Interactive content (calculators, configurators) requires Mediafly editor to create
OAuth2 required — more complex than API key
Content engagement analytics require recipient to interact with shared link
Enterprise pricing and annual contract — significant investment before API value
Salesforce and HubSpot OAuth required separately for CRM signal integration

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US and EU data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Prospect content engagement data is behavioral PII — GDPR consent consideration. Sales content may contain proprietary materials — access control required. Interactive calculator data may contain customer financial projections.
